content.en:
Zhang Lingshen hurriedly flew over and soon came to this purple light world.

"It should be a new world that has just been born!"

Zhang Lingshen will think to himself.

After all, this kind of purple light world is very special, it can be seen from a long distance, if it was born for a long time, it should have been discovered a long time ago, but he has never heard of such a purple light world.

Therefore, this must be a new world that has only just been born.

The great universe now has no dimensional space, so the world born is directly manifested in the void of the great universe, just like the original wasteland, ordinary people can't see it, but the strong can see the world barrier.

Zhang Lingshen did not inform the big forces behind him, so he was going to go in and take a look, in case it was a world rich in resources, he naturally occupied this world, how could he tell the big forces behind him.

Swish!

Zhang Lingshen passed through the world barrier of the Purple Light World and entered the Purple Light World.

As soon as he entered the purple light world, Zhang Lingshen's expression changed greatly, and his face became hideous.

"No!"

A large amount of purple light drilled into his body, and the terrifying power spread, directly annihilating his body, and his soul also dissipated under the erosion of purple light.

In a moment's time, the spirit god will fall.

......

Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian was still cultivating, and Pengyu Tianjun sent a message.

"Purple Light World?"

Ye Tian looked at the content of the interrogation, and was immediately a little surprised, and immediately went out.

However, he didn't see Pengyu Tianjun, only the Black Armor Tianjun.

"Black Armor Heavenly Monarch, what is the situation in the Purple Light World?" Ye Tian asked.

"Daozi, the purple light world is a newly discovered special world, because I didn't know about this world at the beginning, there are some gods who will fall in it one after another, not long ago, a seven-star god will enter the purple light world, and found that the purple light of this purple light world is a special ability, the seven-star god will be difficult to withstand the power of purple light, but the gods above the seven stars or the heavenly monarch can continue to improve the strength of the body under the erosion of the purple light, and the top heavenly monarch can even devour the purple light to refine the body. However, the purple light world is very large, and it has not yet been explored. But no matter what, the purple light world is definitely a top-notch special world, and its value is unimaginable. At present, many Heavenly Monarchs have already traveled to the Purple Light World. "

Heijia Tianjun introduced.

"Thank you Heijia Tianjun, I'm also interested in the Purple Light World, let's go!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Black Armor Heavenly Monarch hurriedly said: "Daozi, your identity is not ordinary, now the purple light world has caused great turmoil, this time has been very chaotic in the past, and there is also a little danger, it is better to go over with a few of us Heavenly Monarchs." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

His current strength is good, but the gap is too big compared to the Heavenly Monarch of the Great Universe.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Great Universe are basically the top Heavenly Monarchs cultivated by the major forces, and they can even leapfrog to compete with the weaker True Monarchs, Ye Tian can only bully and bully some of the native Heavenly Monarchs of the Great Universe, such as the Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouses like the Yuan Gu Heavenly Monarch, but there is no way to compete with other top Heavenly Monarchs, let alone deal with the Heavenly Monarchs.

He has a lot of treasures on him, and it is difficult to guarantee that other Heavenly Monarchs will not do it at this time, so it is safer to follow the Black Armor Heavenly Monarch and the others.

After waiting for a few days, the other Heavenly Monarchs came out one by one, and about seven or eight Heavenly Monarchs went to the Purple Light World with Ye Tian.

It didn't take long for the purple light world to arrive.

Ye Tian looked at it fixedly and was immediately stunned.

At this time, there are void fortresses outside the purple light world, and a large number of divine generals and heavenly monarchs' breaths fill the entire void, this is still the divine generals and heavenly monarchs outside, how many gods and heavenly monarchs should be there when they enter the inside?

Isn't it true that all the gods of the Great Universe and the Heavenly Monarch are here!

From this, it can be seen what a treasure this purple light world is.

"Wanfa Daozi is also here!"

A Miaoman's body appeared in front of Ye Tian, and it was the Yunzi Goddess.

At this time, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden was still an eight-star early stage god general, and she was already far inferior to Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian still didn't dare to underestimate the Yunzi Goddess, after all, it was the Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance, who knew what hole cards and treasures he had on his body, in case he was valued by the Dao Ancestor, he would give some finale treasures casually, and it was estimated that even the Heavenly Monarch would dare to scare it!

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, how about entering the Purple Light World together?" Yun Zi Divine Maiden said: "I heard that the purple light of the Purple Light World is a rare energy, which is of great use to our cultivation, but the purple light is very corrosive, even the Heavenly Monarch can't stay for long. And the depths of the Purple Light World are even more dangerous, not a realm that we can set foot in!" said the Yun Zi Divine Maiden.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian and the Cloud Purple Priestess passed through the barrier of the Purple Light World and entered the Purple Light World.

As soon as he entered the purple light world, a large amount of purple light poured into his body, trying to corrode Ye Tian's body, but Ye Tian's body was so powerful that he was naturally not afraid of purple light corrosion.

Feeling the energy contained in the purple light, Ye Tian immediately activated the Xuanxuan Technique and began to cultivate.

It is difficult for other gods to refine the purple light, so they can only reluctantly use the purple light to forcibly refine their bodies, and they can't hold on for long, and the gods who can hold on for ten minutes are considered good.

However, Ye Tian found that his Void Heaven Dao Body could even devour purple light.

"It's the path of light!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Void Heaven Dao Body engraved with the Dao of Light pattern seemed to be able to absorb any light energy, and no matter how terrifying the purple light was, it would be difficult to escape the refining of the Void Heaven Dao Body.

However, the Void Heaven Dao Body could not completely refine the purple light, and it would still be eroded by the purple light, but the speed was very slow.

"I can stay in the Purple Light World for a long time, this is simply my treasure land. Moreover, the purple light is an excellent auxiliary to the Xuanxu Jue, maybe I can easily cultivate the Xuanxu Jue to the seventh layer of the Perfection Realm in the Purple Light World, and I am even expected to impact the eighth layer of the Xuanxu Jue!" Ye Tian thought.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, some of his minds paid attention to his surroundings, and the other minds controlled his body to run the Xuanxuan Technique and continued to cultivate, and a large amount of purple light poured into his body and was refined by him one by one.

And the Yun Zi Divine Maiden on the other side was also relatively relaxed at first, because she also had special means to refine the purple light, but gradually she couldn't bear it, and her body gradually turned purple.

She glanced at Ye Tian and found that Ye Tian's aura was very normal, and she was stunned: "How can he not be affected by purple light?" I have cultivated a special physique that is rare in chaos like the Ice Purple Holy Body, and I have cultivated to the realm of Dacheng, so I can refine xenomorph energy, purple light has little impact on me, but it can't last for a few days, can he easily refine purple light?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden couldn't think of going to the top of the Void Heaven Dao Body, not to mention that she didn't know the Void Heaven Dao Body, even if she knew the Void Heaven Dao Body, she wouldn't be able to understand Ye Tian's methods.

After all, there are not many Dao patterns inscribed on the Void Heaven Dao Body, and it is not a strong physique, maybe it is not as good as the Ice Purple Holy Body, but once there are many Dao patterns inscribed, it is the first physique of Chaos.
